Package chemaxon.alchemist.configbuilder

Deprecated.
This package is no longer part of the public API, not maintained and will be removed after 6.0
  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    ConfigElementEditor Deprecated
    This class is no longer part of the public API, not maintained and will be removed after 6.0 This interface defines the method any object that would like to be an editor of any ConfigElement needs to implement.
  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    ConfigBuilderPanel Deprecated
    This class is no longer part of the public API, not maintained and will be removed after 6.0 Configuration Builder Panel for list based configuration editing
    ConfigBuilderPanelFactory Deprecated
    This class is no longer part of the public API, not maintained and will be removed after 6.0 Factory for various ConfigBuilderPanel instances
    ConfigElement Deprecated
    This class is no longer part of the public API, not maintained and will be removed after 6.0 This is the abstract ConfigElement.
    Implementations are used in ConfigBuilderPanel, both JLists are filled with ConfigElements.

    The list of ConfigElements is representing a sequence of actions in the output xml

    ConfigElement acts like a model, where the corresponding ConfigElementEditor is the editor.
    ConfigElementFactory Deprecated
    This class is no longer part of the public API, not maintained and will be removed after 6.0 This class is responsible for creating config item objects defined by configuration xml, and bundle file
